title: Step S-SWQT-0020: 表单与选择控件原生语义迁移

items.statement: 把仅需单选语义的导出控件迁移到原生 fieldset/radio/select，同时保留 searchable Combobox 等无完整原生等价物的复合实现。

inScope: PopoverSelect -> native select/options，保持 value/options/onValueChange/disabled/id/aria-label 主 API
Portal demos、catalog 文档与键盘/表单语义回归
outOfScope: searchable Combobox/Command 的 native 化
Radix Select 公共组件的替换
customizable select 实验特性或浏览器前缀方案

items.optionsTelos: Option A：仅在原生行为完整等价时迁移。

items.axisPositioning: required: public API + native form semantics + visual compatibility。
items.axisSplitSnapshot: 仅处理简单单选；searchable/multi-axis composite widgets 明确留在现有实现。

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: radio group legend/name/checked/keyboard；native select value/change/disabled/label；Combobox 仍保留 role/expanded/search behavior。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: Feature AC6/AC8/AC9 -> Portal DOM + keyboard + form change assertions、typecheck、Axe。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: public form control -> integration/browser；prop compatibility -> TypeScript compile；visual -> existing screenshots/targeted screenshot。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: 验证 onValueChange 参数、selected value、disabled、id、aria-label 与样式 class 映射。
testDrivenDesign.coverageMetric: target-driven direct tests for both migrated exports
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 原生 select/option 可样式化能力因浏览器不同；优先语义和可用性，记录视觉差异。

items.explanationSyncBrief: Catalog 说明 PopoverSelect 保留历史名称但使用原生 select；说明 Combobox 保留 custom 的原因。
items.problemDefinition: 简单单选场景目前重建 listbox/button 或按钮组，却没有获得原生表单、键盘与选中状态语义。
items.requirementsDefinition: 用原生 form elements 表达单选；保持主 API；复杂可搜索选择不误迁移。
nonGoals: 不把所有选择控件强行合并为 select。
不承诺 option 高度自定义视觉在所有浏览器一致。

plainLanguage.unclear: 同样是“选择”，是否都应该用 select。
plainLanguage.why: 可搜索 Combobox 与简单单选的交互契约不同。
plainLanguage.outcome: 简单选择回归浏览器原生控件；需要搜索的控件继续保留完整复合交互。
plainLanguage.prose: 让浏览器做它已经会做的单选和键盘工作。

options.name: 原地迁移现有组件实现
options.cuttingPoint: 保留组件名/主 props，DOM 改为 native。
options.impact: 现有消费者无需改主调用。
options.risk: 视觉与少数样式 props 语义变化。
options.rejectWhen: 发现依赖 popover-only 行为的公开契约。

options.name: 新增 NativeSelect/RadioPreset 并弃用旧组件
options.impact: 兼容更显式但旧债务持续。
options.rejectWhen: 原地迁移可保持主 API。

recommendedOption.rationale: 当前组件 props 足以映射到原生 select/radio，能直接改善现有导出。
recommendedOption.assumptionsFromFeature: migrate-forward；视觉差异可接受但交互不得退化。
recommendedOption.assumptionChanges: 若 item/content styling 无法合理映射，文档说明兼容边界。

granularity.whySmallEnough: 两个控件共享 native single-selection 不变量和同一测试策略。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: 分别拆分会重复表单/键盘/文档验证。
granularity.splitSignals: 发现 PopoverSelect 实际需要 searchable 或多选时拆回 design。

readiness.reason: 控件边界、API 映射和测试已明确。

forwardImpact.resolution: 纳入 rendered HTML、Axe、keyboard 和 screenshot gates。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: DateRangePresetPicker、PopoverSelect、Portal demos/browser tests、HTML standards gate 和 catalog docs。
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: 日期预设使用 fieldset/legend/radio；简单枚举使用 select/option；保留组件名、受控 value/onValueChange、disabled/id/aria/name/form 等原生 props；Combobox 维持复合实现。
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: source invariant、native DOM/keyboard/Axe browser test、catalog parity、typecheck baseline comparison。
executionContract.rollbackNotes: 组件实现可独立恢复；contentClassName/itemClassName 已保留为迁移映射。

implementationSummary.whatChanged: DateRangePresetPicker 改为原生 fieldset/legend/radio，并用 label/span 保持 Button 视觉；PopoverSelect 改为受控 native select/option，扩展原生 select props，保留历史样式 props 的可解释映射；Portal demo 变为可交互受控示例；source gate 与 catalog docs 同步。
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: 浏览器现在直接负责单选状态、表单语义和键盘行为，同时搜索型 Combobox 的必要复合语义未被误删。
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: PopoverSelect 名称暂不重命名；复杂 Combobox/Radix Select 不在此 Step；option 深度视觉定制不承诺跨浏览器一致。

changeSurface.configAnchors: N/A（复用 S0019 的 root/CI gate）。
changeSurface.dataOrMigrationAnchors: 公共 DOM 从 button/popover/listbox 改为 select；DateRange 从 buttons 改为 radio。

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: PopoverSelectProps 扩展 native select props并排除 value/onChange 冲突；contentClassName 合并到 select，itemClassName 映射到 option；radio 使用 React.useId 生成组名。
executionNotes.deviationsFromBrief: 无；首次 radio `.check()` 因视觉 label 拦截 pointer 改为真实 label click；Axe 首次在 CSS transition 中采到中间色，稳定 250ms 后复跑通过。
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: 原生 option 的 CSS 支持因浏览器而异；PopoverSelect 的旧 popover-only DOM selectors 不再兼容，符合 migrate-forward。

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: bun run --cwd examples/portal test:browser --grep 'simple selection controls'
validationReferences.notes: light/dark 2/2；覆盖 native tag、option、controlled select、label click、radio ArrowLeft 与 Axe。
仅 9 个既有 source-highlight.tsx literal-type errors；本 Step touched files 无新增诊断。

blocker.reason: 本 Step 直接行为、键盘和 Axe 证据通过；既有 type baseline 延续至 S0022。
blocker.recoveryTrigger: 全量 browser/packed consumer 出现 native form 回归时回到 implement。
blocker.residualRisk: 浏览器原生 select/option 的视觉差异。

items.projectFactUpdateCandidates: update-now: catalog and Do/Don't now identify PopoverSelect as native short-enum control and Combobox as searchable exception.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Only the designed simple-selection exports, demos, tests, gate, and catalog docs changed; status=implemented; Feature standards research and full brief present.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: searched for PopoverSelect use and verified no searchable/multiselect contract; Combobox remains unchanged.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Consumers targeting old popover DOM selectors must migrate.

gateOutcomes.evidence: HTML/catalog gates passed; native select, radio click/ArrowLeft, controlled state and Axe passed in light/dark; workflow/posture passed.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: pointer interception and transition-time contrast failures were reproduced, corrected at the test interaction/stability boundary, then rerun.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: No standalone coverage artifact; accepted skipped-with-reason(target-driven direct browser/static evidence covers both changed exports).

gateOutcomes.evidence: Main value/options/onValueChange/id/disabled/aria path retained; native select props expanded; legacy style props mapped and documented; package docs updated.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: option styling portability and native DOM/ref differences are explicitly recorded under migrate-forward.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Native option styling varies by browser.

items.conditionalGates: not-applicable(no DDL; no repeated sibling skip yet)
items.projectCompanionFactDisposition: update-now: catalog and Do/Don't updated; no project companion path/command change.
items.ssotImpactPrerequisite: passed: shipped component catalog and authoring guidance updated.
items.residualRisk: Old popover-specific selectors and pixel-identical option styling are not preserved.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0020-表单与选择控件原生语义迁移.json
items.validationSummary: HTML/catalog passed；native form DOM/keyboard/Axe light+dark 2/2 passed；known unrelated type baseline carried to S0022.
items.testCaseSummary: Native select/options, controlled update, radio group naming/checking and ArrowLeft behavior verified.
items.coverageSummary: target-driven direct coverage for both migrated exports；no standalone coverage artifact.

requirementAudit.risk: DOM and option styling migrate-forward differences.

requirementAudit.requirement: Complex searchable controls remain justified exceptions
requirementAudit.risk: Future simple selectors could bypass PopoverSelect.
requirementAudit.followUp: HTML source gate and authoring docs remain enforcement surface.

items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: This closure fixture is deleted after promote; unrelated files untouched.
items.acceptanceToAuthorityPropagation: Selection-control acceptance propagated; table and full validation remain future-only S0021/S0022.

Are docs, registry, ledger and stable path aligned?
closingTriad.evidence: finalDocumentEntry, ssotRefs and workflow controlled writes.

closingTriad.question: Is behavior sufficiently verified with residual risk handled?

items.requiredFollowUp: Continue auto to S-SWQT-0021 and S-SWQT-0022.

validationSummary: HTML/catalog passed; native select/radio DOM keyboard Axe light+dark 2/2 passed; known type baseline carried to final scope
